requirement_topic.en: Import via BIS/BEE Registration — Indian Importer, Labels, and Clearance File
requirement_topic.zh: 通过BIS/BEE注册进口——印度进口商、标签与清关文件
requirement_topic.zht: 透過BIS/BEE登記進口——印度進口商、標籤與清關文件

summary.en: Refrigerators shipped from China to India need an India-facing clearance file that aligns the commercial invoice, model identifier, importer of record, BIS licence/registration status, BEE model registration and star label data, safety test evidence, refrigerant declarations, product labels, and packaging markings. BIS and BEE approvals are not merely website listings; the importer must ensure the exact imported model, brand, factory, and label data match the approved record.
summary.zh: 中国出口至印度的电冰箱需要一套面向印度的清关文件，使商业发票、型号标识、登记进口商、BIS许可证/注册状态、BEE型号注册及星级标签数据、安全检测证据、制冷剂声明、产品标签和包装标识保持一致。BIS和BEE批准不只是网站列表；进口商须确保实际进口型号、品牌、工厂及标签数据与获准记录一致。
summary.zht: 中國出口至印度的電冰箱需要一套面向印度的清關文件，使商業發票、型號識別、登記進口商、BIS許可證/登記狀態、BEE型號登記及星級標籤資料、安全檢測證據、製冷劑聲明、產品標籤和包裝標識保持一致。BIS和BEE批准不只是網站列表；進口商須確保實際進口型號、品牌、工廠及標籤資料與獲准記錄一致。

standards_or_laws: BIS Act, 2016 — conformity assessment and standard mark controls
Energy Conservation Act, 2001 — BEE labelling controls
BEE (Appliance Labelling) Regulations, 2009 — registration, model permission, display, and compliance obligations
Indian customs/import documentation controls — importer of record and product identity matching

summary.en: China export files often contain CCC certificates, China Energy Label data, factory inspection records, Chinese labels, and Chinese model families. India requires a separate importer-facing file. If the Chinese export model uses a private-label brand, alternate model number, or India-only rated configuration, those differences must be covered in the BIS/BEE records rather than assumed from China domestic approvals.
summary.zh: 中国出口文件通常包含CCC证书、中国能效标识数据、工厂检查记录、中文标签和中国型号族。印度需要单独的进口商文件。如果中国出口型号采用贴牌品牌、替代型号或印度专用额定配置，这些差异须纳入BIS/BEE记录，而不能依赖中国国内批准覆盖。
summary.zht: 中國出口文件通常包含CCC證書、中國能效標識資料、工廠檢查記錄、中文標籤和中國型號族。印度需要單獨的進口商文件。如果中國出口型號採用貼牌品牌、替代型號或印度專用額定配置，這些差異須納入BIS/BEE記錄，而不能依賴中國國內批准覆蓋。

standards_or_laws: China CCC framework — domestic market certificate and factory surveillance system
China Energy Label framework — domestic model and label data system

gap.en: Before shipment, reconcile the bill of materials, model hierarchy, label artwork, ratings, importer name/address, country-of-origin statements, refrigerant charge, packaging, and online listing data against the India approvals. Common blockers include model suffix mismatch, BEE star label not approved for the imported configuration, missing Indian importer details, outdated refrigerant declaration, and factory/brand mismatch with BIS registration.
gap.zh: 发货前，应将物料清单、型号层级、标签图稿、额定值、进口商名称/地址、原产国声明、制冷剂充注量、包装和线上商品信息与印度批准记录逐项核对。常见阻碍包括型号后缀不匹配、BEE星级标签未覆盖实际进口配置、缺少印度进口商信息、制冷剂声明过期，以及工厂/品牌与BIS注册不一致。
gap.zht: 發貨前，應將物料清單、型號層級、標籤圖稿、額定值、進口商名稱/地址、原產國聲明、製冷劑充注量、包裝和線上商品資訊與印度批准記錄逐項核對。常見阻礙包括型號後綴不匹配、BEE星級標籤未覆蓋實際進口配置、缺少印度進口商資訊、製冷劑聲明過期，以及工廠/品牌與BIS登記不一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where Indian import, BIS, BEE, customs, or product-specific legal controls apply. Specified Indian Standards are compulsory for products within QCO/BEE scope; shipment legality depends on the applicable Act, order, licence, registration, and customs requirements.
mandatory_status.cn: China export clearance and domestic approvals do not substitute for India importer-of-record, BIS/BEE record matching, or India label controls.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Build a shipment-level India compliance pack before export: BIS record, BEE record, importer details, label artwork, refrigerant declaration, model mapping, and invoice/packing-list identity should all match. Do not rely on China domestic approvals at customs or point of sale.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 出口前应建立批次级印度合规包：BIS记录、BEE记录、进口商信息、标签图稿、制冷剂声明、型号映射及发票/装箱单身份信息均应一致。不得在海关或销售点依赖中国国内批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 出口前應建立批次級印度合規包：BIS記錄、BEE記錄、進口商資訊、標籤圖稿、製冷劑聲明、型號映射及發票/裝箱單身份資訊均應一致。不得在海關或銷售點依賴中國國內批准。
